title: Minecraft but you can make portals out of ores!
description: You can craft portals to special dimensions made of a certain ore
body:
Note: This is my first mod you please give me all the feedback you can. All is appreciated!

In this mod, I have added the ability to build portals to custom dimensions made out of a single ore. You can craft portals by arranging the materials ore blocks in the shape of a nether portal. Here is an example with a diamond portal: To assist in getting the ore blocks, I have added recipes which allow you to craft the ore of something out of the material. Just place the material in the center of the crafting grid and surround it with cobblestone. To light the portals, you need to craft each portals igniter. You can use this item to light a portal exactly like you use a flint and steel. To craft a igniter, just follow the crafting below replacing the diamond. That is everything you need to know about my first mod! Please remember to give any feedback on it so I can make better mods in the future. I have also added some extra dimensions such as a haybale dimension, dirt dimension, leaf dimension, quartz dimension and many more constantly being programmed in. Check in regularly to see more blocks being added.

Note: This mod is made for Minecraft Forge 1.17.1 and hasn't been tested for later releases yet! Please play on 1.17.1 with this mod for now. It is unknown when the mod can be updated for 1.18.2.
